document.title: China-Korea Treaty Article 10 Clean Text
notes: Generated by constrained LLM document extraction.

parsed_articles.summary: This article governs the taxation of dividends paid by a company resident in one Contracting State to a resident of the other Contracting State, specifying tax rates and conditions.

source_segments.text: Dividends paid by a company which is a resident of a Contracting State to a resident of the other Contracting State may be taxed in that other Contracting State.

conditions: This paragraph allocates taxing rights between the treaty jurisdictions.
This paragraph does not by itself state a reduced withholding cap.
extracted_rules.review_reason: General rule allowing taxation in the recipient's state.

source_segments.text: However, such dividends may also be taxed in the Contracting State of which the company paying the dividends is a resident, and according to the laws of that State, but if the recipient is the beneficial owner of the dividends the tax so charged shall not exceed: (a) 5 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends if the beneficial owner is a company (other than a partnership) which holds directly at least 25 per cent of the capital of the company paying the dividends; (b) 10 per cent of the gross amount of the dividends in all other cases. This paragraph shall not affect the taxation of the company in respect of the profits out of which the dividends are paid.

extracted_rules.review_reason: Specifies reduced tax rate for substantial holdings.
Default tax rate for other cases.

source_segments.text: The term 'dividends' as used in this Article means income from shares, or other rights, not being debt-claims, participating in profits, as well as income from other corporate rights which is subjected to the same taxation treatment as income from shares by the laws of the State of which the company making the distribution is a resident.

The provisions of paragraphs 1 and 2 shall not apply if the beneficial owner of the dividends, being a resident of a Contracting State, carries on business in the other Contracting State of which the company paying the dividends is a resident, through a permanent establishment situated therein, or performs in that other Contracting State independent personal services from a fixed base situated therein, and the holding in respect of which the dividends are paid is effectively connected with such permanent establishment or fixed base. In such case, the provisions of Article 7 or Article 14, as the case may be, shall apply.

extracted_rules.review_reason: Excepts cases where other articles (e.g., business profits) apply.
